mapper.sql: SELECT yy AS inqire_de, REPLACE(iem_div_id, 'plan', cmmn_cd_nm) AS iem_div_id, inqire_iem_vu FROM PLAN_LIST UNPIVOT ( inqire_iem_vu FOR iem_div_id IN ( plan_cnt AS 'planCnt', plan_eqp_cpcty AS 'planEqpCpcty', plan_amt AS 'planAmt' ) ) UNION ALL SELECT yy AS inqire_de, REPLACE(iem_div_id, 'cnstrc', cmmn_cd_nm) AS iem_div_id, inqire_iem_vu FROM CNSTRC_LIST UNPIVOT ( inqire_iem_vu FOR iem_div_id IN ( cnstrc_cnt AS 'cnstrcCnt', cnstrc_eqp_cpcty AS 'cnstrcEqpCpcty', cnstrc_amt AS 'cnstrcAmt' ) ) UNION ALL SELECT yy AS inqire_de, iem_div_id, inqire_iem_vu FROM MNTMNG_LIST UNION ALL SELECT yy AS inqire_de, REPLACE(iem_div_id, 'dsuse', cmmn_cd_nm) AS iem_div_id, inqire_iem_vu FROM DSUSE_LIST UNPIVOT ( inqire_iem_vu FOR iem_div_id IN ( dsuse_cnt AS 'dsuseCnt', dsuse_eqp_cpcty AS 'dsuseEqpCpcty', dsuse_amt AS 'dsuseAmt' ) ) ORDER BY inqire_de, iem_div_id
mapper.select: /* DSBRD_PBME_Dao_retrievePbmeSttusList */ WITH YEAR_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4)) + LEVEL - 1) AS yy FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 4)) - TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4)) + 1) ), MAPPING_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(C B A) */ A.yy, B.lnk_esntl_id, B.ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, ( SELECT MAX(SUBSTR(ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, 0, 3)) FROM tm_ecs_ectcc_lnk WHERE lnk_esntl_id = B.lnk_esntl_id ) AS prgs_sttus, C.cmmn_cd, C.cmmn_cd_nm, C.sort_ordr, C.usr_dfn_vu1 FROM YEAR_LIST A, ( SELECT SUBSTR(drft_de, 0, 4) AS yy, lnk_esntl_id, SUBSTR(ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, 0, 3) AS ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd FROM tm_ecs_ectcc_lnk WHERE drft_de BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) || '0101' AND ( SELECT MAX(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) || '1231' GROUP BY SUBSTR(drft_de, 0, 4), lnk_esntl_id, SUBSTR(ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, 0, 3) ) B, ( SELECT A.cmmn_cd, A.cmmn_cd_nm, A.sort_ordr, B.cmmn_cd AS usr_dfn_vu1 FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 0, 3) AS cmmn_cd, MAX(usr_dfn_vu1) AS cmmn_cd_nm, MAX(sort_ordr) AS sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2000' GROUP BY SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 0, 3) ORDER BY sort_ordr ) A, ( SELECT cmmn_cd, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2004' ) B WHERE A.cmmn_cd_nm = B.usr_dfn_vu1(+) ) C WHERE A.yy = B.yy(+) AND B.ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd(+) = C.cmmn_cd ), , PLAN_INIT_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.yy, B.plan_esntl_id, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm) AS cmmn_cd_nm, A.cmmn_cd, MAX(B.plan_eqp_cpcty) AS plan_eqp_cpcty, MAX(B.plan_amt) AS plan_amt FROM ( SELECT yy, lnk_esntl_id, ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, sort_ordr, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM MAPPING_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm LIKE 'plan%' ) A, tm_pb10001 B WHERE A.lnk_esntl_id = B.plan_esntl_id(+) GROUP BY A.yy, B.plan_esntl_id, A.cmmn_cd ), CNSTRC_INIT_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.yy, B.cnstrc_esntl_id, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm) AS cmmn_cd_nm, A.cmmn_cd, MAX(B.cms_bsns_cd) AS cms_bsns_cd, MAX(B.cms_prjct_cd) AS cms_prjct_cd, MAX(B.cms_prjct_sqnc_idtfr) AS cms_prjct_sqnc_idtfr, MAX(B.cnstrc_eqp_cpcty) AS cnstrc_eqp_cpcty, MAX(SUBSTR(B.last_compet_de, 0, 4)) AS last_compet_de, MAX(B.competam) AS competam FROM ( SELECT yy, lnk_esntl_id, ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, sort_ordr, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM MAPPING_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm LIKE 'cnstrc%' ) A, tm_pb10002 B WHERE A.lnk_esntl_id = B.cnstrc_esntl_id(+) GROUP BY A.yy, B.cnstrc_esntl_id, A.cmmn_cd ), DSUSE_INIT_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.yy, B.dsuse_esntl_id, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm) AS cmmn_cd_nm, A.cmmn_cd, MAX(B.cms_bsns_cd) AS cms_bsns_cd, MAX(B.cms_prjct_cd) AS cms_prjct_cd, MAX(B.cms_prjct_sqnc_idtfr) AS cms_prjct_sqnc_idtfr, MAX(B.eqp_cpcty) AS eqp_cpcty, MAX(SUBSTR(B.last_compet_de, 0, 4)) AS last_compet_de, MAX(B.competam) AS competam FROM ( SELECT yy, lnk_esntl_id, ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, sort_ordr, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM MAPPING_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm LIKE 'dsuse%' ) A, tm_me20001 B WHERE A.lnk_esntl_id = B.dsuse_esntl_id(+) GROUP BY A.yy, B.dsuse_esntl_id, A.cmmn_cd ), CMS_VIEW AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE RESULT_CACHE */ bsns_cd, prjct_cd, prjct_sqnc_idtfr, last_compet_de, competam FROM CMS.vm_cs01003_01 WHERE (bsns_cd, prjct_cd) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT cms_bsns_cd, cms_prjct_cd FROM DSUSE_INIT_LIST UNION SELECT DISTINCT cms_bsns_cd, cms_prjct_cd FROM CNSTRC_INIT_LIST ) ), CNSTRC_CMS_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.yy, A.cnstrc_esntl_id, A.cmmn_cd_nm, A.cmmn_cd, A.cnstrc_eqp_cpcty, DECODE(TRIM(B.last_compet_de), NULL, A.last_compet_de, B.last_compet_de) AS last_compet_de, DECODE(TRIM(B.competam), NULL, A.competam, B.competam) AS competam FROM CNSTRC_INIT_LIST A, CMS_VIEW B WHERE A.cms_bsns_cd = B.bsns_cd(+) AND A.cms_prjct_cd = B.prjct_cd(+) AND A.cms_prjct_sqnc_idtfr = B.prjct_sqnc_idtfr(+) ), MNTMNG_FMS_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.yy, A.cmmn_cd_nm, B.iem_div_cd, ROUND(NVL(B.competam, 0) / 1000 / 1000 / 100, 2) AS amt, B.ordg_no FROM ( SELECT yy, lnk_esntl_id, ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, sort_ordr, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM MAPPING_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm LIKE 'mng%' ) A, ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(A B IEM_DATA_LIST) */ B.yy, IEM_DATA_LIST.iem_div_cd, B.competam, B.ordg_no FROM tm_me10001 A, ( SELECT A.ordg_no, A.rqest_no, SUBSTR(B.last_compet_de, 0, 4) AS yy, B.competam FROM FMS.vm_ct01017_01 A, FMS.vm_ct05002_01 B WHERE A.ordg_no = B.cntrct_no AND B.last_compet_de BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) || '0101' AND ( SELECT MAX(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) || '1231' ) B, IEM_DATA_LIST WHERE A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd != '99' AND A.cntrct_no = B.ordg_no(+) AND B.rqest_no = IEM_DATA_LIST.rqest_no(+) UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(A.slip_pstde, 0, 4) AS yy, '03' AS iem_div_cd, A.sum_amt AS competam, A.slip_no AS ordg_no FROM tm_me10002 A WHERE A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd != '99' AND A.slip_pstde BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) || '0101' AND ( SELECT MAX(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) || '1231' ) B WHERE A.yy = B.yy(+) AND A.usr_dfn_vu1 = B.iem_div_cd(+) ), DSUSE_CMS_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.yy, A.dsuse_esntl_id, A.cmmn_cd_nm, A.cmmn_cd, A.eqp_cpcty, DECODE(TRIM(B.last_compet_de), NULL, A.last_compet_de, B.last_compet_de) AS last_compet_de, DECODE(TRIM(B.competam), NULL, A.competam, B.competam) AS competam FROM DSUSE_INIT_LIST A, CMS_VIEW B WHERE A.cms_bsns_cd = B.bsns_cd(+) AND A.cms_prjct_cd = B.prjct_cd(+) AND A.cms_prjct_sqnc_idtfr = B.prjct_sqnc_idtfr(+) ), PLAN_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ yy, cmmn_cd_nm, COUNT(plan_esntl_id) AS plan_cnt, CASE WHEN INSTR(cmmn_cd_nm, 'Compt', 1, 1) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(SUM(plan_eqp_cpcty / 1000), 0), 2) ELSE ROUND(SUM(plan_eqp_cpcty / 1000), 2) END AS plan_eqp_cpcty, CASE WHEN INSTR(cmmn_cd_nm, 'Compt', 1, 1) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(SUM(plan_amt / 1000 / 1000 / 100), 0), 2) ELSE ROUND(SUM(plan_amt / 1000), 2) END AS plan_amt FROM ( SELECT yy, plan_esntl_id, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd, NULL AS plan_eqp_cpcty, NULL AS plan_amt FROM PLAN_INIT_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm NOT LIKE '%Compt%' UNION ALL SELECT yy, plan_esntl_id, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd, plan_eqp_cpcty, plan_amt FROM PLAN_INIT_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm LIKE '%Compt%' ) GROUP BY yy, cmmn_cd_nm ), CNSTRC_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ yy, cmmn_cd_nm, COUNT(cnstrc_esntl_id) AS cnstrc_cnt, CASE WHEN INSTR(cmmn_cd_nm, 'Compt', 1, 1) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(SUM(cnstrc_eqp_cpcty / 1000), 0), 2) ELSE ROUND(SUM(cnstrc_eqp_cpcty / 1000), 2) END AS cnstrc_eqp_cpcty, CASE WHEN INSTR(cmmn_cd_nm, 'Compt', 1, 1) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(SUM(competam / 1000 / 1000 / 100), 0), 2) ELSE ROUND(SUM(competam / 1000), 2) END AS cnstrc_amt FROM ( SELECT yy, cnstrc_esntl_id, cmmn_cd_nm, NULL AS cnstrc_eqp_cpcty, NULL AS competam FROM CNSTRC_CMS_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm NOT LIKE '%Compt%' UNION ALL SELECT yy, cnstrc_esntl_id, cmmn_cd_nm, cnstrc_eqp_cpcty, competam FROM CNSTRC_CMS_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm LIKE '%Compt%' ) GROUP BY yy, cmmn_cd_nm ), MNTMNG_LIST AS( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ yy, cmmn_cd_nm AS iem_div_id, COUNT(ordg_no) AS inqire_iem_vu FROM MNTMNG_FMS_LIST GROUP BY yy, cmmn_cd_nm UNION ALL SELECT yy, 'mngAmt' AS iem_div_id, SUM(amt) AS inqire_iem_vu FROM MNTMNG_FMS_LIST GROUP BY yy ), DSUSE_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ yy, cmmn_cd_nm, COUNT(dsuse_esntl_id) AS dsuse_cnt, CASE WHEN INSTR(cmmn_cd_nm, 'Compt', 1, 1) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(SUM(eqp_cpcty / 1000), 0), 2) ELSE ROUND(SUM(eqp_cpcty / 1000), 2) END AS dsuse_eqp_cpcty, CASE WHEN INSTR(cmmn_cd_nm, 'Compt', 1, 1) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(SUM(competam / 1000 / 1000 / 100), 0), 2) ELSE ROUND(SUM(competam / 1000), 2) END AS dsuse_amt FROM ( SELECT yy, dsuse_esntl_id, cmmn_cd_nm, NULL AS eqp_cpcty, NULL AS competam FROM DSUSE_CMS_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm NOT LIKE '%Compt%' UNION ALL SELECT yy, dsuse_esntl_id, cmmn_cd_nm, eqp_cpcty, competam FROM DSUSE_CMS_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm LIKE '%Compt%' ) GROUP BY yy, cmmn_cd_nm )

/* DSBRD_PBME_Dao_retrievePbmeSttusSetcscList */ WITH YEAR_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4)) + LEVEL - 1) AS yy FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 4)) - TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4)) + 1) ), MAPPING_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(C B A) */ A.yy, B.lnk_esntl_id, B.ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, C.cmmn_cd, C.cmmn_cd_nm, C.cmmn_cd_nm1, C.cmmn_cd_nm2, C.sort_ordr, C.usr_dfn_vu1 FROM YEAR_LIST A, ( SELECT SUBSTR(drft_de, 0, 4) AS yy, lnk_esntl_id, SUBSTR(ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, 0, 3) AS ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd FROM tm_ecs_ectcc_lnk WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY SUBSTR(drft_de, 0, 4), lnk_esntl_id, SUBSTR(ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, 0, 3) ) B, ( SELECT A.cmmn_cd, A.usr_dfn_vu1 AS cmmn_cd_nm, REGEXP_SUBSTR(A.cmmn_cd_nm, '[^-]+', 1, 1) AS cmmn_cd_nm1, REGEXP_SUBSTR(A.cmmn_cd_nm, '[^-]+', 1, 2) AS cmmn_cd_nm2, A.sort_ordr, B.cmmn_cd AS usr_dfn_vu1 FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 0, 3) AS cmmn_cd, MAX(usr_dfn_vu1) AS usr_dfn_vu1, MAX(cmmn_cd_nm) AS cmmn_cd_nm, MAX(sort_ordr) AS sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2000' GROUP BY SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 0, 3) ORDER BY sort_ordr ) A, ( SELECT cmmn_cd, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2004' ) B WHERE A.usr_dfn_vu1 = B.usr_dfn_vu1(+) ) C WHERE A.yy = B.yy(+) AND B.ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd(+) = C.cmmn_cd ), , PLAN_INIT_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.yy, B.plan_esntl_id, MAX(B.ecs_setcsc_div_cd) AS ecs_setcsc_div_cd, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm) AS cmmn_cd_nm, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm1) AS cmmn_cd_nm1, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm2) AS cmmn_cd_nm2, A.cmmn_cd FROM ( SELECT yy, lnk_esntl_id, ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_nm1, cmmn_cd_nm2, sort_ordr, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM MAPPING_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm LIKE 'plan%' ) A, tm_pb10001 B WHERE A.lnk_esntl_id = B.plan_esntl_id(+) GROUP BY A.yy, B.plan_esntl_id, A.cmmn_cd ), CNSTRC_INIT_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B C) */ A.yy, B.cnstrc_esntl_id, MAX(C.ecs_setcsc_div_cd) AS ecs_setcsc_div_cd, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm) AS cmmn_cd_nm, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm1) AS cmmn_cd_nm1, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm2) AS cmmn_cd_nm2, A.cmmn_cd, MAX(B.cms_bsns_cd) AS cms_bsns_cd, MAX(B.cms_prjct_cd) AS cms_prjct_cd, MAX(B.cms_prjct_sqnc_idtfr) AS cms_prjct_sqnc_idtfr, MAX(SUBSTR(B.last_compet_de, 0, 4)) AS last_compet_de, MAX(B.competam) AS competam FROM ( SELECT yy, lnk_esntl_id, ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_nm1, cmmn_cd_nm2, sort_ordr, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM MAPPING_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm LIKE 'cnstrc%' ) A, tm_pb10002 B, tm_pb10001 C WHERE A.lnk_esntl_id = B.cnstrc_esntl_id(+) AND B.plan_esntl_id = C.plan_esntl_id(+) GROUP BY A.yy, B.cnstrc_esntl_id, A.cmmn_cd ), DSUSE_INIT_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.yy, B.dsuse_esntl_id, MAX(B.ecs_setcsc_div_cd) AS ecs_setcsc_div_cd, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm) AS cmmn_cd_nm, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm1) AS cmmn_cd_nm1, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm2) AS cmmn_cd_nm2, A.cmmn_cd, MAX(B.cms_bsns_cd) AS cms_bsns_cd, MAX(B.cms_prjct_cd) AS cms_prjct_cd, MAX(B.cms_prjct_sqnc_idtfr) AS cms_prjct_sqnc_idtfr, MAX(SUBSTR(B.last_compet_de, 0, 4)) AS last_compet_de FROM ( SELECT yy, lnk_esntl_id, ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_nm1, cmmn_cd_nm2, sort_ordr, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM MAPPING_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm LIKE 'dsuse%' ) A, tm_me20001 B WHERE A.lnk_esntl_id = B.dsuse_esntl_id(+) GROUP BY A.yy, B.dsuse_esntl_id, A.cmmn_cd ), CMS_VIEW AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE RESULT_CACHE */ bsns_cd, prjct_cd, prjct_sqnc_idtfr, last_compet_de FROM CMS.vm_cs01003_01 WHERE (bsns_cd, prjct_cd) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT cms_bsns_cd, cms_prjct_cd FROM DSUSE_INIT_LIST UNION SELECT DISTINCT cms_bsns_cd, cms_prjct_cd FROM CNSTRC_INIT_LIST ) ), CNSTRC_CMS_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.yy, A.cnstrc_esntl_id, A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, A.cmmn_cd_nm, A.cmmn_cd_nm1, A.cmmn_cd_nm2, A.cmmn_cd, DECODE(TRIM(B.last_compet_de), NULL, A.last_compet_de, B.last_compet_de) AS last_compet_de FROM CNSTRC_INIT_LIST A, CMS_VIEW B WHERE A.cms_bsns_cd = B.bsns_cd(+) AND A.cms_prjct_cd = B.prjct_cd(+) AND A.cms_prjct_sqnc_idtfr = B.prjct_sqnc_idtfr(+) ), MNTMNG_FMS_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.yy, B.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, A.cmmn_cd_nm, A.cmmn_cd_nm1, A.cmmn_cd_nm2, B.iem_div_cd, B.ordg_no, A.sort_ordr FROM ( SELECT yy, lnk_esntl_id, ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_nm1, cmmn_cd_nm2, sort_ordr, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM MAPPING_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm LIKE 'mng%' ) A, ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(A B IEM_DATA_LIST) */ B.yy, A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, IEM_DATA_LIST.iem_div_cd, B.ordg_no FROM tm_me10001 A, ( SELECT A.ordg_no, A.rqest_no, SUBSTR(B.last_compet_de, 0, 4) AS yy, B.competam FROM FMS.vm_ct01017_01 A, FMS.vm_ct05002_01 B WHERE A.ordg_no = B.cntrct_no AND B.last_compet_de BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) || '0101' AND ( SELECT MAX(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) || '1231' ) B, IEM_DATA_LIST WHERE A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd != '99' AND A.cntrct_no = B.ordg_no(+) AND B.rqest_no = IEM_DATA_LIST.rqest_no(+) UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(A.slip_pstde, 0, 4) AS yy, A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, '03' AS iem_div_cd, A.slip_no AS ordg_no FROM tm_me10002 A WHERE A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd != '99' AND A.slip_pstde BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) || '0101' AND ( SELECT MAX(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) || '1231' ) B WHERE A.yy = B.yy(+) AND A.usr_dfn_vu1 = B.iem_div_cd(+) ), DSUSE_CMS_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.yy, A.dsuse_esntl_id, A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, A.cmmn_cd_nm, A.cmmn_cd_nm1, A.cmmn_cd_nm2, A.cmmn_cd, DECODE(TRIM(B.last_compet_de), NULL, A.last_compet_de, B.last_compet_de) AS last_compet_de FROM DSUSE_INIT_LIST A, CMS_VIEW B WHERE A.cms_bsns_cd = B.bsns_cd(+) AND A.cms_prjct_cd = B.prjct_cd(+) AND A.cms_prjct_sqnc_idtfr = B.prjct_sqnc_idtfr(+) ), PLAN_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_nm2 AS gubun1, (NVL(lgwtpw, 0) + NVL(smlhp, 0) + NVL(tdpw, 0) + NVL(snpw, 0) + NVL(wdpw, 0) + NVL(wtht, 0)) AS sum, NVL(lgwtpw, 0) AS lgwtpw, NVL(smlhp, 0) AS smlhp, NVL(tdpw, 0) AS tdpw, NVL(snpw, 0) AS snpw, NVL(wdpw, 0) AS wdpw, NVL(wtht, 0) AS wtht FROM ( SELECT yy, cmmn_cd_nm, MAX(cmmn_cd_nm1) AS cmmn_cd_nm1, MAX(cmmn_cd_nm2) AS cmmn_cd_nm2, setcsc_nm, COUNT(plan_esntl_id) AS plan_cnt, DECODE(MAX(cmmn_cd_nm2), '수립', '0', '진행', '1', '완료', '2', '0' ) AS sort_ordr FROM ( SELECT yy, plan_esntl_id, ecs_setcsc_div_cd, ( SELECT usr_dfn_vu1 FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1001' AND cmmn_cd = SUBSTR(ecs_setcsc_div_cd, 0, 1) || '0' ) AS setcsc_nm, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_nm1, cmmn_cd_nm2, cmmn_cd FROM PLAN_INIT_LIST WHERE 1 = 1 /* AND plan_esntl_id IS NOT NULL */ ) GROUP BY yy, cmmn_cd_nm, setcsc_nm ) PIVOT ( SUM(plan_cnt) FOR setcsc_nm IN ( 'lgwtpw' AS lgwtpw, 'smlhp' AS smlhp, 'tdpw' AS tdpw, 'snpw' AS snpw, 'wdpw' AS wdpw, 'wtht' AS wtht ) ) ORDER BY sort_ordr ), CNSTRC_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_nm2 AS gubun1, (NVL(lgwtpw, 0) + NVL(smlhp, 0) + NVL(tdpw, 0) + NVL(snpw, 0) + NVL(wdpw, 0) + NVL(wtht, 0)) AS sum, NVL(lgwtpw, 0) AS lgwtpw, NVL(smlhp, 0) AS smlhp, NVL(tdpw, 0) AS tdpw, NVL(snpw, 0) AS snpw, NVL(wdpw, 0) AS wdpw, NVL(wtht, 0) AS wtht FROM ( SELECT yy, cmmn_cd_nm, MAX(cmmn_cd_nm1) AS cmmn_cd_nm1, MAX(cmmn_cd_nm2) AS cmmn_cd_nm2, setcsc_nm, COUNT(cnstrc_esntl_id) AS cnstrc_cnt, DECODE(MAX(cmmn_cd_nm2), '시행', '0', '진행', '1', '완료', '2', '0' ) AS sort_ordr FROM ( SELECT yy, cnstrc_esntl_id, ecs_setcsc_div_cd, ( SELECT usr_dfn_vu1 FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1001' AND cmmn_cd = SUBSTR(ecs_setcsc_div_cd, 0, 1) || '0' ) AS setcsc_nm, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_nm1, cmmn_cd_nm2, cmmn_cd FROM CNSTRC_CMS_LIST WHERE 1 = 1 /* AND cnstrc_esntl_id IS NOT NULL */ ) GROUP BY yy, cmmn_cd_nm, setcsc_nm ) PIVOT ( SUM(cnstrc_cnt) FOR setcsc_nm IN ( 'lgwtpw' AS lgwtpw, 'smlhp' AS smlhp, 'tdpw' AS tdpw, 'snpw' AS snpw, 'wdpw' AS wdpw, 'wtht' AS wtht ) ) ORDER BY sort_ordr ), MNTMNG_LIST AS( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_nm2 AS gubun1, (NVL(lgwtpw, 0) + NVL(smlhp, 0) + NVL(tdpw, 0) + NVL(snpw, 0) + NVL(wdpw, 0) + NVL(wtht, 0)) AS sum, NVL(lgwtpw, 0) AS lgwtpw, NVL(smlhp, 0) AS smlhp, NVL(tdpw, 0) AS tdpw, NVL(snpw, 0) AS snpw, NVL(wdpw, 0) AS wdpw, NVL(wtht, 0) AS wtht FROM ( SELECT yy, cmmn_cd_nm, MAX(cmmn_cd_nm1) AS cmmn_cd_nm1, MAX(cmmn_cd_nm2) AS cmmn_cd_nm2, setcsc_nm, COUNT(ordg_no) AS mntmng_cnt, DECODE(MAX(sort_ordr), NULL, '0', MAX(sort_ordr)) AS sort_ordr /* DECODE(MAX(cmmn_cd_nm2), '점검정비', '0', '개대체', '1', '수선유지', '2', '0' ) AS sort_ordr */ FROM ( SELECT yy, ordg_no, ecs_setcsc_div_cd, ( SELECT usr_dfn_vu1 FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1001' AND cmmn_cd = SUBSTR(ecs_setcsc_div_cd, 0, 1) || '0' ) AS setcsc_nm, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_nm1, cmmn_cd_nm2, sort_ordr FROM MNTMNG_FMS_LIST WHERE 1 = 1 /* AND ordg_no IS NOT NULL */ ) GROUP BY yy, cmmn_cd_nm, setcsc_nm ) PIVOT ( SUM(mntmng_cnt) FOR setcsc_nm IN ( 'lgwtpw' AS lgwtpw, 'smlhp' AS smlhp, 'tdpw' AS tdpw, 'snpw' AS snpw, 'wdpw' AS wdpw, 'wtht' AS wtht ) ) ORDER BY sort_ordr ), DSUSE_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_nm2 AS gubun1, (NVL(lgwtpw, 0) + NVL(smlhp, 0) + NVL(tdpw, 0) + NVL(snpw, 0) + NVL(wdpw, 0) + NVL(wtht, 0)) AS sum, NVL(lgwtpw, 0) AS lgwtpw, NVL(smlhp, 0) AS smlhp, NVL(tdpw, 0) AS tdpw, NVL(snpw, 0) AS snpw, NVL(wdpw, 0) AS wdpw, NVL(wtht, 0) AS wtht FROM ( SELECT yy, cmmn_cd_nm, MAX(cmmn_cd_nm1) AS cmmn_cd_nm1, MAX(cmmn_cd_nm2) AS cmmn_cd_nm2, setcsc_nm, COUNT(dsuse_esntl_id) AS dsuse_cnt, DECODE(MAX(cmmn_cd_nm2), '수립', '0', '진행', '1', '완료', '2', '0' ) AS sort_ordr FROM ( SELECT yy, dsuse_esntl_id, ecs_setcsc_div_cd, ( SELECT usr_dfn_vu1 FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1001' AND cmmn_cd = SUBSTR(ecs_setcsc_div_cd, 0, 1) || '0' ) AS setcsc_nm, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_nm1, cmmn_cd_nm2, cmmn_cd FROM DSUSE_CMS_LIST WHERE 1 = 1 /* AND dsuse_esntl_id IS NOT NULL */ ) GROUP BY yy, cmmn_cd_nm, setcsc_nm ) PIVOT ( SUM(dsuse_cnt) FOR setcsc_nm IN ( 'lgwtpw' AS lgwtpw, 'smlhp' AS smlhp, 'tdpw' AS tdpw, 'snpw' AS snpw, 'wdpw' AS wdpw, 'wtht' AS wtht ) ) ORDER BY sort_ordr ) SELECT cmmn_cd_nm, gubun1, sum, lgwtpw, smlhp, tdpw, snpw, wdpw, wtht FROM PLAN_LIST UNION ALL SELECT cmmn_cd_nm, gubun1, sum, lgwtpw, smlhp, tdpw, snpw, wdpw, wtht FROM CNSTRC_LIST UNION ALL SELECT cmmn_cd_nm, gubun1, sum, lgwtpw, smlhp, tdpw, snpw, wdpw, wtht FROM MNTMNG_LIST UNION ALL SELECT cmmn_cd_nm, gubun1, sum, lgwtpw, smlhp, tdpw, snpw, wdpw, wtht FROM DSUSE_LIST

/* DSBRD_PBME_Dao_retrievePSttusBasinList */ WITH YEAR_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4)) + LEVEL - 1) AS yy FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 4)) - TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4)) + 1) ), MAPPING_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(C B A) */ A.yy, B.lnk_esntl_id, B.ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, C.cmmn_cd, C.cmmn_cd_nm, C.sort_ordr, C.usr_dfn_vu1 FROM YEAR_LIST A, ( SELECT SUBSTR(drft_de, 0, 4) AS yy, lnk_esntl_id, SUBSTR(ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, 0, 3) AS ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd FROM tm_ecs_ectcc_lnk WHERE drft_de BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) || '0101' AND ( SELECT MAX(yy) FROM YEAR_LIST ) || '1231' GROUP BY SUBSTR(drft_de, 0, 4), lnk_esntl_id, SUBSTR(ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, 0, 3) ) B, ( SELECT A.cmmn_cd, A.cmmn_cd_nm, A.sort_ordr, B.cmmn_cd AS usr_dfn_vu1 FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 0, 3) AS cmmn_cd, MAX(usr_dfn_vu1) AS cmmn_cd_nm, MAX(sort_ordr) AS sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2000' GROUP BY SUBSTR(cmmn_cd, 0, 3) ORDER BY sort_ordr ) A, ( SELECT cmmn_cd, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2004' ) B WHERE A.cmmn_cd_nm = B.usr_dfn_vu1(+) ) C WHERE A.yy = B.yy(+) AND B.ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd(+) = C.cmmn_cd ), PLAN_INIT_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(B A) */ A.yy, A.plan_esntl_id, A.basin_cd, B.cmmn_cd_nm AS basin_nm, A.cmmn_cd_nm, A.cmmn_cd, A.plan_eqp_cpcty, A.plan_amt FROM ( SELECT yy, plan_esntl_id, AS basin_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd, plan_eqp_cpcty, plan_amt FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(A B) */ A.yy, B.plan_esntl_id, MAX(B.edpt_cd) AS edpt_cd, MAX(B.edpt_nm) AS edpt_nm, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm) AS cmmn_cd_nm, A.cmmn_cd, MAX(B.plan_eqp_cpcty) AS plan_eqp_cpcty, MAX(B.plan_amt) AS plan_amt FROM ( SELECT yy, lnk_esntl_id, ecs_bsns_prgs_div_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, sort_ordr, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM MAPPING_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm LIKE 'plan%' ) A, ( SELECT ecs_chrg_dept_id AS edpt_cd, ( SELECT stext FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE (objid, enddt) = ( SELECT objid, MAX(enddt) AS enddt FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE objid = ecs_chrg_dept_id GROUP BY objid ) ) AS edpt_nm, plan_esntl_id, plan_eqp_cpcty, plan_amt FROM tm_pb10001 ) B WHERE A.lnk_esntl_id = B.plan_esntl_id(+) GROUP BY A.yy, B.plan_esntl_id, A.cmmn_cd ) A ) A, ( SELECT upobj, MAX(cmmn_cd_nm) AS cmmn_cd_nm, MAX(cmmn_cd) AS cmmn_cd FROM (
) GROUP BY upobj ) B WHERE A.basin_cd = B.upobj(+) ), PLAN_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ yy, cmmn_cd_nm, COUNT(plan_esntl_id) AS plan_cnt, CASE WHEN INSTR(cmmn_cd_nm, 'Compt', 1, 1) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(SUM(plan_eqp_cpcty / 1000), 0), 2) ELSE ROUND(SUM(plan_eqp_cpcty / 1000), 2) END AS plan_eqp_cpcty, CASE WHEN INSTR(cmmn_cd_nm, 'Compt', 1, 1) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(SUM(plan_amt / 1000 / 1000 / 100), 0), 2) ELSE ROUND(SUM(plan_amt / 1000), 2) END AS plan_amt FROM ( SELECT yy, plan_esntl_id, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd, NULL AS plan_eqp_cpcty, NULL AS plan_amt FROM PLAN_INIT_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm NOT LIKE '%Compt%' UNION ALL SELECT yy, plan_esntl_id, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd, plan_eqp_cpcty, plan_amt FROM PLAN_INIT_LIST WHERE cmmn_cd_nm LIKE '%Compt%' ) GROUP BY yy, cmmn_cd_nm ) SELECT yy AS inqire_de, REPLACE(iem_div_id, 'plan', cmmn_cd_nm) AS iem_div_id, inqire_iem_vu FROM PLAN_LIST UNPIVOT ( inqire_iem_vu FOR iem_div_id IN ( plan_cnt AS 'planCnt', plan_eqp_cpcty AS 'planEqpCpcty', plan_amt AS 'planAmt' ) ) ORDER BY inqire_de, iem_div_id
